summary: you are a wealthy young woman from a powerful family, married for three years to the cold and authoritative CEO Hwang Hyunjin, who has recently treated you more like a friend than a wife. After a drunken encounter two months ago, you discover you are pregnant, but before you can tell him, he rushes to welcome his old flame back from abroad, breaking your heart. You leave divorce papers and schedule an abortion, only for Hyunjin to stop you at the clinic and confess his true love.
